body_txt: Generally, skeletons were once seen as genuinely horrifying. They ended up becoming Camp at a later point... But, that is not what this trope is about . This trope is about skeletons and/or skeleton-like beings and monsters who are completely sinister and Played for Horror . They brandish weapons, and can sometimes hiss without throats and stare through you without their eyes. Can Overlap with Eldritch Abomination and Undead Abomination . The Grim Reaper is often, though not always, portrayed as this. Super-Trope to SkeleBot 9000 , Skeletons in the Coat Closet , and Skull for a Head . Sub-Trope of Dem Bones . Contrast Easily Scattered Skeleton , which tend to suck the spook-factor out of the skeletons in question, and Friendly Skeleton , who are deliberately not meant to be scary.
